nodes.context: British music group and street gang in the UK drill scene, based in Brixton Hill, London.
Rival drill group and street gang.
Gang allegedly associated with Cheyon Evans, a rival of 67.
Gang based in Clapham, one of 67's main rivals.

edges.evidence_quote: On 25 February 2015, a member of the drill group and street gang, 150, Dwayne Simpson aka SQ, was stabbed to death by a member of 67 over a gang dispute.
edges.context: A member of 67 killed a member of 150 in a gang dispute.

edges.evidence_quote: Cheyon Evans was known as 'Stompz' and allegedly was a part of the 37/OJB gang, with him also having ties to the CT gang based in Clapham, one of 67's main rivals.
edges.context: Cheyon Evans, associated with 37/OJB, was killed by a 67 member, indicating rivalry.

edges.evidence_quote: Cheyon Evans was known as 'Stompz' and allegedly was a part of the 37/OJB gang, with him also having ties to the CT gang based in Clapham, one of 67's main rivals.
edges.context: CT is described as one of 67's main rivals.
